other_observers: Joe Dunn; It was reported from someone that I had never heard of before. Nick Komar and Rachel Hopper both saw the bird in different observations during the 2 days that I heard it was there.
specific_location: At a small pond called Blue Spruce Pond in northern Fort Collins
description: It has a thick black bill. It also has a black head with a white cheek patch and yellow on top of the head with long yellow plumes with a red eye. It had a blue-gray body and neck. Most of the feathers on the back had black on the inside of each feather with blue-gray on the outer edge of each feather.Behaviors: It was usually just standing at the edge of a small pond on a small island in the middle. I saw it fly once, but then it returned to the back side of that island.Call: Didn’t hear itPlumage: Adult
